interfaces.name: getProductCategories
interfaces.description: Fetch top-level product categories (cement, lime, low-carbon cements) for navigation and homepage sections.

interfaces.name: getHomePageHighlights
interfaces.description: Get homepage overview content including categories, featured products, featured low-carbon products, and upcoming events/webinars.

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Return available filter options for a product category (cement, lime, low-carbon cements) including packaging, strength classes, types, and numeric ranges.

items.description: Available strength class labels, e.g., 'CEM I 42.5R', 'CEM I 52.5R'.

interfaces.name: listProducts
interfaces.description: List products for a given category with filtering and sorting, used on category listing pages.

parameters.name: search_query
parameters.description: Optional free-text search within the category.

items.description: Strength class labels to include, e.g., 'CEM I 42.5R'.
Cement family codes to include, e.g., 'cem_i', 'cem_ii'.
Lime type codes to include, e.g., 'quicklime', 'hydrated_lime'.
Physical form codes to include, e.g., 'lumps', 'powder'.

min_co2_footprint_kg_per_ton.description: Minimum CO2 footprint in kg CO2/ton.

max_co2_footprint_kg_per_ton.description: Maximum CO2 footprint in kg CO2/ton.

min_price_per_ton.description: Minimum price per ton in selected currency.

max_price_per_ton.description: Maximum price per ton in selected currency.

is_low_carbon.description: If true, include only low-carbon products.

currency.description: Desired currency code for price filtering, e.g., 'usd', 'eur'.

interfaces.name: getProductDetails
interfaces.description: Get full technical and commercial details for a specific product to display on the product detail page.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to load (comes from the current page context).

min_order_quantity.description: Minimum order quantity in the product's unit of measure.

max_order_quantity.description: Maximum order quantity in the product's unit of measure, if applicable.

interfaces.name: getProductDocuments
interfaces.description: Fetch downloadable documents for a product, such as Technical Data Sheets and Safety Data Sheets.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Product ID whose documents should be retrieved.

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a product to the shopping cart with quantity and optional delivery details. Creates a cart if one does not exist.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to add (from product detail or listing).

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Quantity to add in units matching 'quantity_unit' (or the product's default unit).

parameters.name: quantity_unit
parameters.description: Optional quantity unit, e.g., 'ton', 'bag_25kg'. Defaults to the product's unit_of_measure.

parameters.name: delivery_date
parameters.description: Requested delivery date in ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2025-06-15'.

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Retrieve the current cart contents, including items, delivery details, and subtotal, for display on the cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of an existing cart item and return the updated cart summary.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the CartItem to update.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity in the item's quantity_unit.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemDeliveryDetails
interfaces.description: Update delivery date and/or delivery option for a cart item.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the CartItem to update.

parameters.name: delivery_date
parameters.description: New requested delivery date in ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2025-06-15'.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and return the updated cart summary.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the CartItem to remove.

interfaces.name: getConcreteCalculatorConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration for concrete calculators, including supported calculator types and application types.

interfaces.name: calculateConcreteForSlab
interfaces.description: Calculate concrete volume and cement requirement for a slab and return recommended cement products.

interfaces.name: getConcreteCalculatorSession
interfaces.description: Retrieve a previously created concrete calculator session and its results.

interfaces.name: getComparisonList
interfaces.description: Get the current product comparison list and the products within it for display on the comparison page.

interfaces.name: addProductToComparison
interfaces.description: Add a product to the comparison list and return the updated list.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to add to comparison.

interfaces.name: removeProductFromComparison
interfaces.description: Remove a product from the comparison list and return the updated list.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to remove from comparison.

interfaces.name: clearComparisonList
interfaces.description: Clear all products from the comparison list.

interfaces.name: getDistributorSearchOptions
interfaces.description: Get configuration and option lists for the distributor locator, including supported countries and product segments.

interfaces.name: searchDistributors
interfaces.description: Search for distributors by postal code, country, radius, and product segments, returning a list sorted as requested.

parameters.name: postal_code
parameters.description: Postal or ZIP code to search around, e.g., '75008'.

items.description: Product segment codes to filter on, e.g., ['bulk_cement'].

interfaces.name: getDistributorDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific distributor, used on the distributor detail page.

parameters.name: distributorId
parameters.description: ID of the distributor to load (from locator results).

interfaces.name: submitDistributorContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a distributor-specific contact or information request from the distributor detail page.

parameters.name: distributorId
parameters.description: ID of the distributor being contacted.

parameters.name: location_text
parameters.description: Requester's location or address text, e.g., '75008 Paris, France'.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message body including any reference to the distributor.

interfaces.name: getEventsFilters
interfaces.description: Get available filters and presets for the events and webinars listing page.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search events and webinars by type, date range, keyword, and location for the events listing page.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date (inclusive) in ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2025-06-01'.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date (inclusive) in ISO 8601 format, e.g., '2025-06-30'.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Keyword to search in title, description, and keywords, e.g., 'sustainable cement'.

parameters.name: is_sustainable_cement_related
parameters.description: If true, only include events related to sustainable cement.

parameters.name: location_country
parameters.description: Country code filter for onsite events, e.g., 'germany'.

interfaces.name: getEventDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific event or webinar, including agenda and speakers, for the event detail page.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to load.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Submit an on-site registration for a selected event or webinar.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event being registered for.

interfaces.name: addProductToQuote
interfaces.description: Add a product to the quote request basket, creating a draft quote if needed.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to add to the quote.

parameters.name: quantity_unit
parameters.description: Unit for the quantity, e.g., 'ton', 'bag_25kg'. Defaults to the product's unit_of_measure.

interfaces.name: getQuoteSummary
interfaces.description: Retrieve the current draft quote, including all items and estimated totals, for the quote summary page.

interfaces.name: updateQuoteItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a quote item and return the updated quote summary, used to reach a target budget range.

parameters.name: quoteItemId
parameters.description: ID of the QuoteItem to update.

interfaces.name: removeQuoteItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the quote and return the updated quote summary.

parameters.name: quoteItemId
parameters.description: ID of the QuoteItem to remove.

interfaces.name: submitQuoteContactDetails
interfaces.description: Submit contact and project details for the current draft quote and mark it as submitted to sales.

interfaces.name: getCareerFilters
interfaces.description: Get available filters for the careers page, including countries and departments.

interfaces.name: searchJobPostings
interfaces.description: Search open job postings by country, department, and keyword for the careers listing page.

parameters.name: location_country
parameters.description: Country code to filter by, e.g., 'germany'.

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Keyword to search in job titles and descriptions, e.g., 'Engineer'.

interfaces.name: getJobPostingDetails
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific job posting for the job detail page.

parameters.name: jobPostingId
parameters.description: ID of the job posting to load.

interfaces.name: submitJobApplicationStepOne
interfaces.description: Submit the first step of an online job application, capturing personal details and experience.

parameters.name: jobPostingId
parameters.description: ID of the job posting being applied for.

parameters.name: total_experience_years
parameters.description: Total years of professional experience, e.g., 5.

parameters.name: willing_to_travel
parameters.description: Whether the applicant is willing to travel.

interfaces.name: getAboutUsContent
interfaces.description: Get structured content for the About Us page, including company history, operations, markets, and sustainability initiatives.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get corporate contact details for the Contact Us page, including addresses, phone numbers, and general email addresses.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a generic inquiry via the Contact Us form for questions or feedback.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Topic or category of the inquiry, e.g., 'product_support', 'sustainability'.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Short subject line for the inquiry.

reference_id.description: Internal reference ID for tracking the inquiry.

interfaces.name: getLegalContent
interfaces.description: Get legal and privacy document content (terms of use, privacy policy, cookie policy) for the Legal & Privacy page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current Cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal and line totals after cart changes.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateQuote
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current draft Quote or create a new one if needed.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateQuoteTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute quote subtotal and item line totals.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateComparisonList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the ComparisonList for the current user context.

helperFunctions.name: _createOrUpdateConcreteCalculatorSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist ConcreteCalculatorSession records when calculations are performed.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateConcreteRequirements
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute concrete volume and cement quantity based on slab parameters and application type.

helperFunctions.name: _geocodeAndFindNearestDistributors
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to geocode postal codes, compute distances, and filter distributors by radius and product segments.

helperFunctions.name: _filterEvents
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply event type, date range, keyword, and sustainability filters to Event records.

helperFunctions.name: _filterJobPostings
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply location, department, and keyword filters to JobPosting records.
